prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-DAMAGEDSCREWEXTRACTOR-4PC Product Type: FASTENER_DRIVE_BIT Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: Universal Tool Damaged Screw Extractor Set - 4 Pieces Assorted Sizes Description: Extract damaged screws easily with the Universal Tool Damaged Screw Extractor Set.

This set comes with 4 drill bits, each with a shank size of 3/8" that can be used with a reverse driver variable speed drill to extract damaged screws. They are constructed of stainless steel and have 63-65 bit hardness. They come in 4 assorted sizes - 1 through 4.

These are very simple to use. First you need to locate a threaded or damaged crew head, and then with the drill in reverse drive, use side 1 to create a smooth cavity within the damaged head. With the drill still in reverse drive, insert side 2 into the cavity and begin to extract the screw. Make sure to grab a set of these to keep in your toolbox, workshop or shed. Search Terms: screw extractor stripped screw extractor screw extractor set screw extractor kit damaged screw extractor screw remover and extractor precision screw extractor set broken screw extractor small screw extractor damaged screw extractor set Features: - 4 Piece Damaged Screw Extractor Set - HSS Bit Material - Shank Size: 3/8" - 63-65 Bit Hardness - Assorted Sizes: 1-4 - Use with A Reverse Drive 3/8" Chuck Variable Speed Drill === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
